content.cpe: Synthetic budget that details costs by construction phase. Automatically calculated from line items.
content.dashboard: Visual charts and graphs presenting results and enabling comparisons between different cost categories.
content.dataSource: This system uses the SINAPI SP database – SINAPI_Custo_Ref_Composicoes_Analitico_SP_202412_Desonerado. You can use different databases that suit your company by updating the SINAPI catalog.
content.fillStep1: Only the 'Line Items' tab needs to be filled manually. All other tabs are automatically calculated.
content.fillStep2: Use the SINAPI search to find materials and compositions by code or description. The system will auto-complete unit costs.
content.fillStep3: The BDI calculation is configured once and applied automatically to all phases and line items.
content.important: All data is automatically saved to the database. Changes sync in real-time across all tabs.
content.lineItems: The only tab you need to fill with your project data. Enter quantities for each line item (materials, labor, equipment).
content.overview: Budget with project information summary. Fill in missing project details and view key metrics.
content.reports: Compilation table of costs by phase. Shows detailed breakdown with Labor, Materials, L.S, BDI, Total, and % of Total.
content.tip1: Save your work frequently to avoid data loss.
content.tip2: Use the Dashboard to visualize budget health and identify cost concentrations.
content.tip3: Export to Excel or PDF to share with stakeholders.
content.welcome: Welcome to CastorWorks Budget Module 5.0! This guide will help you understand how to use the budget system effectively.
